description: Formulate Hadamard matrix search as QUBO and solve via quantum annealing. Suksmono demonstrated this for small orders. For order 668, decompose into overlapping subproblems with sliding-window approach.
mathematical_formalization: Minimize H_penalty = sum_{r<s} (sum_k h_{rk}*h_{sk})^2 over h_{ij} in {-1,+1}. QUBO encoding via q_{ij} = (1-h_{ij})/2.
analogical_connections: QUBO ~ Ising spin glass ground state
implementation_hypothesis: SQA with transverse-field Ising model. Sliding windows of 20 rows over 668 columns. Iterate until convergence.
experiment_seed: SQA on row-orthogonality Hamiltonian. Random start, anneal in 20-row windows. Track residual norm.
